overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city street in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring neon-lit billboards, pedestrians with glowing umbrellas, and futuristic vehicles. The character proceeds from an open intersection into a covered walkway and finally enters a modern corporate building with sterile white interiors transitioning to a dark red-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: futuristic black vehicle drives through the intersection from right to left
camera tilts upward to look at the towering skyscraper facade

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet yellow-striped crosswalk through the rainy intersection

notable_agents.action: sleek black futuristic car driving through the intersection with headlights on
person with umbrella standing at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing painted on wet asphalt
large blue holographic advertisement glowing on building facade
dark modern building wall with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy night intersection in a futuristic city. The character walks across a yellow-striped crosswalk while a black futuristic car drives past. Neon blue holographic advertisements glow against the dark buildings as the camera tilts up to reveal a towering glass skyscraper.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway with neon advertisements

events.description: enter covered walkway beneath the massive overpass structure
briefly turn to avoid pedestrian with red umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person carrying red glowing umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk
person with purple umbrella walking in the same direction

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure overhead providing partial shelter from rain
large purple and pink digital advertisement screen displaying animated content
massive structural columns lining the left side of the walkway
destination building entrance visible at the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Moving under the elevated highway overpass, the environment becomes partially sheltered from the rain. The walkway is lined with concrete pillars on the left and features glowing purple digital billboards on the right. Several pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas walk ahead as the character progresses toward a building entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern corporate building lobby with water features

events.description: enter the modern building lobby from the outdoor covered walkway
transition from bright white lobby lighting to darker interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the automatic sliding doors into the sterile white marble lobby

entered.detail: futuristic automatic sliding doors with metallic vertical slats
shallow pools of water reflecting the overhead lights on the lobby floor
sterile white stone walls with clean geometric patterns
recessed ceiling lights providing bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a pristine modern building lobby featuring white marble walls and reflective water features on the floor. The space is brightly lit with recessed ceiling panels, creating a stark contrast to the rainy night outside. The camera moves through the automatic doors and proceeds toward a darker interior corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior corridor with red emergency lighting

events.description: corridor illumination shifts to red emergency lighting
pass by a stationary figure standing against the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously through the dimly lit corridor with red ambient lighting

notable_agents.action: figure standing motionless against the wall in the red-lit corridor

entered.detail: crimson warning lights casting a red glow on walls and floor
darkened office spaces visible through glass panels along the corridor

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a narrow corridor bathed in red emergency lighting. The white marble walls continue but are now tinted crimson by the warning lights. Glass windows reveal darkened office spaces to the right. The character passes a stationary figure standing against the wall as they proceed deeper into the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-drenched futuristic intersection into the sterile and eventually ominous depths of a corporate building. It begins at a neon-lit crosswalk where a black futuristic car glides past under the glow of blue holographic advertisements, with the camera tilting upward to reveal a towering glass skyscraper. As the character moves under an elevated highway overpass, the rain subsides and the environment shifts toward a sheltered walkway lined with concrete pillars and purple digital billboards. The scene then opens into a pristine building lobby of white marble and reflective water features, creating a stark, brightly lit contrast to the dark city outside. Finally, the camera proceeds through automatic doors into a narrow corridor where the white walls are tinted crimson by red emergency lighting, passing a stationary figure as the path leads deeper into the building.
